title: Stop Watching Tutorials - Build These 4 Claude Projects to 10x Output
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates four Claude Code projects: an AI Board of Advisors, a niche Command Center, an AI-optimized personal website, and an Internal Operating System. The video promotes Claude Code integration and BuildPartner as tools for rapid AI application development.
